The following events took place in '''3965 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] first began to combat the [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic Military]] in the [[Mandalorian Wars]] as they moved closer and closer to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] edge, thus beginning the "False War."<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
*<!-- 2012-04-03 -->''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''
